report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides: Euler V2 Modular Lending (EVK/EVC architecture, $671M TVL, 297+ vaults, institutional pivot under new CEO Jonathan Han) and Hyperlane Permissionless Interoperability (150+ chains, Warp Routes with $6B+ bridged, ISM modular security, HYPER token) — both covering major 2026 DeFi infrastructure narratives not previously covered on degen0x.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1 — Euler Finance V2 Modular Lending: Euler V2 launched after 31 security audits following the $197M V1 hack in 2023. Core architecture: Euler Vault Kit (EVK) for permissionless vault deployment + Ethereum Vault Connector (EVC) for vault-to-vault collateral chaining. Four vault types: escrowed collateral, governed, ungoverned, yield aggregator. Grew 575% in 3 months to ~$671M TVL. Expanded to Base, Swell, Sonic, BOB, Berachain, Avalanche with 297+ vaults. In January 2026, new CEO Jonathan Han pivoted strategy toward 'bespoke credit markets' for institutional/fintech clients. Now supports tokenized RWA collateral (US Treasury bills). EUL token: ~$18.5M market cap. Planned Synthetic USD Currency for capital efficiency.

Topic 2 — Hyperlane Permissionless Interoperability: First permissionless interoperability layer — anyone can deploy on any chain without approval. Deployed on 150+ chains across EVM, SVM, CosmWasm, and Move VMs. Core components: Mailbox contracts, Interchain Security Modules (ISMs) for modular/customizable security, and Warp Routes for token bridging ($6B+ volume). Warp Routes 2.0 introduced native liquidity rebalancing and collateral-agnostic bridging. HYPER token TGE: April 22, 2025 (57% community, 25% team, 10.9% investors, 7.1% foundation). In Feb 2026, enabled WBTC transfers between Ethereum and Solana via Nexus bridge. Competes with LayerZero, Wormhole, Axelar, and Chainlink CCIP.
Sources: euler.finance, theblock.co, defillama.com, coingecko.com, coinmarketcap.com, hyperlane.xyz, coindesk.com, cryptorank.io, tiger-research.com, osl.com, docs.hyperlane.xyz

sections.title: Content Created
items: euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026: ~2,800-word intermediate guide covering what Euler V2 is (modular lending paradigm), EVK and EVC architecture deep dive, four vault types explained, advanced features (sub-accounts, P&L simulator, stop-loss/take-profit, reduced liquidation costs), hack recovery story and 31-audit rebuild, 2026 institutional pivot and RWA collateral, comparison table (Euler V2 vs Aave vs Morpho vs Compound), getting started guide, and 6 FAQs.

hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability-guide-2026: ~2,500-word intermediate guide covering Hyperlane overview (permissionless deployment, 150+ chains), core architecture (Mailbox, relayers, interchain gas), ISM deep dive (multisig, oracle, quorum, merkle proof types), Warp Routes and 2.0 features, HYPER token economics and expansion rewards, comparison table (Hyperlane vs LayerZero vs Wormhole vs Axelar vs CCIP), 2026 developments (WBTC bridge, rollup infrastructure), and 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Euler V2 page — Title: 'Euler V2 Modular Lending Guide 2026 — Vaults & EVK | degen0x' (58 chars). Target keyword: Euler V2 guide 2026. Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 questions). Internal links to 5 related pages (morpho-protocol, restaking-eigenlayer, defi-vaults, rwa-tokenization, dca-calculator). OG article type with publishedTime 2026-04-01 + Twitter summary_large_image.

Hyperlane page — Title: 'Hyperlane Guide 2026 — Permissionless Interop & HYPER | degen0x' (58 chars). Target keyword: Hyperlane guide 2026. Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 questions). Internal links to 5 related pages (cross-chain-interoperability, cross-chain-messaging-protocols, modular-blockchain-stack, chain-abstraction, dca-calculator). OG article type with publishedTime 2026-04-01 + Twitter summary_large_image.
Both pages include combineSchemas with Article + FAQ structured data, proper OG/Twitter metadata, and cross-links.

sections.title: Infrastructure Changes
items: Updated src/lib/published-pages.ts: added both slugs to PUBLISH_QUEUE
No interactive components needed — both are static learn guides with comparison tables and FAQ sections
